summary: Created robust YAML frontmatter parser (scripts/lib/yaml-frontmatter-parser.mjs) using js-yaml to replace fragile regex-based extraction in consolidate-skills.mjs. The new parser handles all YAML formats: quoted/unquoted strings, single-line bracket arrays, multi-line dash arrays, block scalars (> and |), YAML comments, CRLF line endings, and missing fields. Updated consolidate-skills.mjs to use parseFrontmatter() while preserving the existing triggers extraction from markdown body. Added 71 tests (19 unit + 52 integration) covering both opencode and antigravity SKILL.md formats.
